name: Team Management - New Requirement Alert
subject: New Requirement Raised: {{ doc.requirement_title }}
message:
A new requirement {{ doc.requirement_title }} has been raised by {{ doc.requested_by }}.

Priority: {{ doc.priority }}
Due Date: {{ doc.due_date }}

name: Team Management - New Assignment Alert
subject: New Work Assigned: {{ doc.name }}
message:
You have been assigned new work by {{ doc.assigned_by }}.

Priority: {{ doc.priority }}
Due Date: {{ doc.due_date }}

{{ doc.instructions }}

name: Team Management - Task Completed Alert
subject: Task Completed: {{ doc.name }}
message: {{ doc.assigned_to }} has marked assignment {{ doc.name }} as Completed.

name: Team Management - Leave Application Status Changed
subject: Leave Application {{ doc.status }}: {{ doc.name }}
message:
Your leave application {{ doc.name }} has been {{ doc.status }}.

Leave Type: {{ doc.leave_type }}
From: {{ doc.from_date }} To: {{ doc.to_date }}
Approved/Rejected By: {{ doc.approved_by }}
Remarks: {{ doc.approval_remarks }}

name: Team Management - Feedback Given
subject: Feedback Given for Assignment: {{ doc.name }}
message:
Your team head has marked {{ doc.name }} as Completed.

Please check the feedback section for your review.
